The Hook

ChaiTrade

Skill-swapping over Chai.

The Problem

The "Centralized" Trap

🕵️

Privacy

Big platforms sell your data. We don't even have a database to store it.

💰

Cost

Centralized storage grows expensive. ChaiTrade is free forever.

🔓

Passwords

Forget email resets. You own your cryptographic passport.

The Tech

Powered by the
Gun.js Mesh

Every browser is a database node. When you join, you become part of the campus network. No middleman. No central server. Pure P2P.

The Future

Open. Free. Global.
